name: FlexCAD (ICML 2025)
notes: LLaMA-3-8B fine-tuned with LoRA on ABC dataset CAD sequences. Generates CAD feature sequences that are reconstructed to OBJ/STL via a 3-step pipeline (sample.py → parser.py → visual_obj.py). IMPORTANT: model was not trained on natural language prompts — uses unconditional sampling. Text prompts are stored for record only. Run via Modal A10G GPU.
